title: melicope retusa
intro: Melicope retusa, also known as the Toothbrush Tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its essential oils and bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Melicope retusa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
